name: WooCommerce
description: Connect your WooCommerce store to manage products, orders, customers, and e-commerce workflows

get_products.label: Get Products
get_products.description: Retrieve a list of WooCommerce products

get_product.label: Get Product
get_product.description: Get a specific WooCommerce product by ID

get_orders.label: Get Orders
get_orders.description: Retrieve a list of WooCommerce orders

get_order.label: Get Order
get_order.description: Get a specific WooCommerce order by ID

get_customers.label: Get Customers
get_customers.description: Retrieve a list of WooCommerce customers

get_customer.label: Get Customer
get_customer.description: Get a specific WooCommerce customer by ID

create_product_category.label: Create Product Category
create_product_category.description: Create a new WooCommerce product category

username.label: WordPress Username (Optional)
username.description: WordPress admin username for WordPress REST API endpoints

password.label: WordPress Password (Optional)
password.description: WordPress admin password for WordPress REST API endpoints
